'''âk-h-n''' ('''kakahan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:starrify|starrify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:starrify|starrify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-h-n
|-
! Lemma
| kakahan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikahan|thikahan]] || [[word:jikahan|jikahan]] || [[word:shikahan|shikahan]] || [[word:kikahan|kikahan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukahan|thuthukahan]] || [[word:jujukahan|jujukahan]] || [[word:shushukahan|shushukahan]] || [[word:kukukahan|kukukahan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukahan|thukahan]] || [[word:jukahan|jukahan]] || [[word:shukahan|shukahan]] || [[word:kukahan|kukahan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukahan|thukahan]] || [[word:jukahan|jukahan]] || [[word:shukahan|shukahan]] || [[word:kukahan|kukahan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekahan|thekahan]] || [[word:jekahan|jekahan]] || [[word:shekahan|shekahan]] || [[word:kekahan|kekahan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokahan|thothokahan]] || [[word:jojokahan|jojokahan]] || [[word:shoshokahan|shoshokahan]] || [[word:kokokahan|kokokahan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokahan|thokahan]] || [[word:jokahan|jokahan]] || [[word:shokahan|shokahan]] || [[word:kokahan|kokahan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokahan|thokahan]] || [[word:jokahan|jokahan]] || [[word:shokahan|shokahan]] || [[word:kokahan|kokahan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkahan|thĂŠkahan]] || [[word:jĂŠkahan|jĂŠkahan]] || [[word:shĂŠkahan|shĂŠkahan]] || [[word:kĂŠkahan|kĂŠkahan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakahan|thathakahan]] || [[word:jajakahan|jajakahan]] || [[word:shashakahan|shashakahan]] || [[word:kakakahan|kakakahan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakahan|thakahan]] || [[word:jakahan|jakahan]] || [[word:shakahan|shakahan]] || [[word:kakahan|kakahan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakahan|thakahan]] || [[word:jakahan|jakahan]] || [[word:shakahan|shakahan]] || [[word:kakahan|kakahan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakahan|shakahan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakahan|goshakahan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakahan|gokishakahan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakahanĂŒ|shakahanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakahanknĂŒ|goshakahanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahanĂŒ|gokishakahanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakahanshĂ«|shakahanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakahankshĂ«|goshakahankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakahanshĂ«|gokishakahanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahanro|shakahanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahankro|goshakahankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahanro|gokishakahanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahanmu|shakahanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahankmu|goshakahankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahanmu|gokishakahanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakahansher|shakahansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakahanksher|goshakahanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakahansher|gokishakahansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakahang|shakahang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakahankng|goshakahankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakahang|gokishakahang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakahanya|shakahanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakahankya|goshakahankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakahanya|gokishakahanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakahanyam|shakahanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakahankyam|goshakahankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakahanyam|gokishakahanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahanĂŒshĂ«|shakahanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahanknĂŒshĂ«|goshakahanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahanĂŒshĂ«|gokishakahanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahanĂŒro|shakahanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahanknĂŒro|goshakahanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahanĂŒro|gokishakahanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahanĂŒmu|shakahanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahanknĂŒmu|goshakahanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahanĂŒmu|gokishakahanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahanshĂ«nĂŒ|shakahanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakahankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakahanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahanshĂ«ro|shakahanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahankshĂ«ro|goshakahankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahanshĂ«ro|gokishakahanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahanshĂ«mu|shakahanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahankshĂ«mu|goshakahankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahanshĂ«mu|gokishakahanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahanronĂŒ|shakahanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahankronĂŒ|goshakahankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahanronĂŒ|gokishakahanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahanroshĂ«|shakahanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahankroshĂ«|goshakahankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahanroshĂ«|gokishakahanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakahanromu|shakahanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakahankromu|goshakahankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakahanromu|gokishakahanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakahanmunĂŒ|shakahanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakahankmunĂŒ|goshakahankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakahanmunĂŒ|gokishakahanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakahanmushĂ«|shakahanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakahankmushĂ«|goshakahankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakahanmushĂ«|gokishakahanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakahanmuro|shakahanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakahankmuro|goshakahankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakahanmuro|gokishakahanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
